# **Custom Rodeo Flags**

![Custom Rodeo Flags | Banners.com](https://web2printdata.blob.core.windows.net/w2p-cms-1/25-03-05-BANS-Rodeo-Flags.jpg)

Stand out in the arena by using custom rodeo flags! For sponsor displays and team representation or simply increasing your events visual appeal these flags are designed to attract attention. These flags are made to stay intact in rodeo dust and wind while performing well in action and display settings. Custom flags are the ultimate way to add additional excitement to your rodeo. So saddle up—it’s time to show off in style!

*   [Create your Product](#cust)
*   [Product Overview](#f668e42d-4871-4fc7-914d-798f7ca336ff)

Step 1 - Choose Size and Quantity

## Choose Size

_Click on a template to customize your product_

#### [Material](#materialCollapse)

All flags are printed using a direct dye-sublimation printing process. This means the ink dyes the fabric rather than sitting on top of the material. This allows the flag material to act in its natural state rather than being weighed down or made more rigid with ink adhered ot the surface. This is an important factor while looking for properly manufactured flags.

The dye-sublimation printing process creates an eye-popping display. You can add full-color images, custom logos, graphics and text to your flag.

**_\*\* Our fabric flags are a polyester-nylon blend. they are NOT the same material as a standard U.S. flag\*\*_**

Our fabric material is temperature sensitive and due to the printing process it can expand and contract due to heat or cold. Because of this we cannot guarantee the exact size of any fabric product due to temperature fluctuations. We are not responsible for any product received that is too small or big for your purposes. If the size needs to be precise, such as if it is being installed into an existing frame or hardware, please express this to your CSR to discuss your specific application.

**What is the lifespan of your 3x5 flags?**

With proper care and installation, our custom made 3x5 flags have an outdoor life span of 3 to 6 months. We do however recommend that you take your flag down and store indoors during inclement weather to help increase its lifespan.

**Do your 3x5 flags come with a warranty?**

Yes, we offer a warranty on a prorated monthly basis for our standard flags.

For example, a prorated warranty on a standard 3x5 flag that fails 2 months after proper installment will be replaced and we will cover 33% of the replacement cost for a new 3x5 flag.

#### [Finishing Options](#finishing-optionsCollapse)

**Flag Options**

**Single / Reverse**

* * *

![Single / Reverse Flag](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Single-Reverse-Sided-both-WEB-KB.jpg)

These flags are printed on a single layer of material. This allows the ink to fully permeate the material, causing a reverse image on the back.

This means, when the flag is flipped, the artwork will appear reversed.

**Double Sided**

* * *

![Double Sided Flag](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Double-Sided-both-WEB-KB.jpg)

These flags are printed on two separate layers, with a blockout liner between.

This means that any wording and/or images will always be seen in the same orientation.

#### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse)

#### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse)

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps files — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

#### [Artwork/Order Proofs](#artworkorder-proofsCollapse)

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

#### [Color Match Proof System](#color-match-proof-systemCollapse)

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

#### [Production Times](#production-timesCollapse)

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

#### **2 Business Days Express:**

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

![2 Business Day Express Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-2 Business Days Express.jpg)

*   Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

![3 Business Day Standard Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-3 Business Days Standard.jpg)

*   Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver.jpg)

*   Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### [Payment](#paymentCollapse)

All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://www.banners.com/resources/online-orders-pay-with-check).

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

#### [Shipping](#shippingCollapse)

#### [General Shipping Guidelines](#general-shipping-guidelinesCollapse)

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Please visit our [Banners.com shipping information page](https://www.banners.com/shipping-info) for more information about Custom Flag shipping times.

#### [Shipping Maps](#shipping-mapsCollapse)

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications.

#### [Shipping Methods](#shipping-methodsCollapse)

We offer the following shipping methods:

Economy ( 5–10 Business Days )

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )

Three Day ( 3 Business Days )

Two Day ( 2 Business Days )

UPS Overnight ( 1 Business Day )

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

**Did we answer all your questions?**

If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

      

×

#### Upload a Print Ready File

Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.

**For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.**

## More About Rodeo Flags

Custom rodeo flags are more than just flags, they are vibrant, moving advertisements that can catch everyone's attention at your event. We use dye-sublimation printing, which means the ink actually gets absorbed into the fabric instead of just sitting on the top. This makes your design pop with colors that wont fade, no matter how many rides or dusty winds they face. 

### Three Easy Ways to Order Rodeo Flags

**Online Designer**

Create your own design using our online design tool. Customize your 3' x 5' flag with background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics.

**Upload a File**

Upload your own artwork (.eps, .pdf, .jpg). For more information, check out the Product Info tab above.

**Professional Designer**

Our customer service team of professional graphic designers are able to create a custom design for you. Upload any artwork you want on your fabric flag and provide instructions for us.

## Frequently Asked Questions [Return to Top](#top)

#### What are your rodeo flag finishing options?

A left header pole pocket is a pole pocket on the left side of your rodeo banner that is sewn at the top, designed to fit a pole for riders to hold while on horseback. This makes the banner easy to carry in parades, grand entries, and rodeo arenas.

#### What material are the flags made from? 

Our rodeo flags are made from durable, weather-resistant polyester to withstand wind, dust, and outdoor conditions.

#### Can I print my sponsor’s logo on the flag?

Yes! We offer full-color printing to showcase sponsor logos, team names, or any custom design.

#### Do the rodeo flags come with poles?

No, the flags do not come with poles. You can purchase poles separately or use your own.

#### Are your flags easy to carry on horseback?

Yes! Our 3' x 5' flags are designed to be the perfect size for riders—big enough to stand out but easy to handle.

#### Can I use these flags for more than just rodeos?

Absolutely! They’re great for parades, events, or anywhere you want to show off a bold design.

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
